name: HTS_WORKER_AVAILABILITY_PREFS
description: Table to store the worker availability preferences.

columns.Name: AVAILABILITY_PREFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: A unique system-generated identifier for worker availability preference.

columns.Name: REASON
columns.Comments: Reason corresponding to availability preference type

columns.Name: REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Reason corresponding to availability preference type

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the person to which the availability preference belongs.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of the worker availability preference.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date of the worker availability preference.

columns.Name: REPEAT_CYCLE
columns.Comments: Repeating cycle of worker availability preference.

columns.Name: REPEAT_DURATION
columns.Comments: Defines the duration of repeat cycle.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments given by the worker at the time of creating/updating preference.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ALL_DAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Availability Preference covers the entire day.
